goal_text: Task 06981: You are looking for a restaurant in the south part of town and it should serve scandinavian food. If there is no such venue how about italian type of food. Make sure you get the phone number and postcode of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
